title: Aurora, 61024, Sparkle Tales, Seaweed Penguin, 7In, Soft Toy, Blue
features: From Aurora's highly popular Sparkle Tales Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Gorgeous Sparkle accent materials, with glitter eyes
Children will love this cute, colourful and hugely collectable character
description: The Sparkle Tales Kingdom is a fantasy world where all kinds of magical creatures live. It is a place where fairy tales and imaginations are free to roam. The Sparkle Tales World consists of forests, desert, sea and a magical castle. Seaweed Penguin lives in the Enchanted Sea within the Sparkle Tales Kingdom with the other Sparkle Tales sea creatures. Seaweed has a beautiful blue and white body which is super-soft and perfect for cuddles. He has gorgeous sparkly material on his nose and feet which compliments his beautiful sparkly eyes. Seaweed loves hanging out with his fellow sea creatures and has many friends throughout the Sparkle Tales Kingdom. Collect them all. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
